subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One, at this hour, maketh mention of one of the handmaidens of God and, through His grace, giveth her glad-tidings this day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظلوم در این حین یکی از اماء الله را ذکر میفرماید و بفضل حق بشارت میدهد امروز
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement
